meta.title: Sounds
meta.subtitle: Kazakh vowels, harmony, and Cyrillic letters that differ from Russian.

blocks.text: Kazakh Cyrillic includes special letters: ә, ғ, қ, ң, ө, ұ, ү, h, і. Vowel harmony means front vowels (е, i, ü…) take front suffixes.

items: Қ is a back k — deeper in the throat
Listen for vowel length — it can change meaning
Use 🔊 on every word in Vocab and Reading
